blocks.content: One child, seeing Shirone's attire, frowned.

blocks.speaker: Child
blocks.content: Principal, he's not a noble. He looks like a commoner.

blocks.speaker: Child
blocks.content: Commoners aren't allowed in here. Hey, you, get out quickly!
Alpheus, who hadn't expected him not to be a noble, scratched his eyebrow awkwardly.
But as a magician who pursues knowledge, he didn't discriminate by status and beckoned him to come.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: It's alright, come over here. So, which of this old man's words caught your attention?
Shirone stood hesitantly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He wanted to approach Alpheus, but the children's gazes blocked his approach.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: They seemed to be saying: Don't invade our territory, you insignificant commoner.

blocks.speaker: Child
blocks.content: Show me magic.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: Hoho, have you never seen magic?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I've read about it in books, but never seen it directly.
One child pointed and shouted: Liar! How could a commoner read books?
Alpheus stared deeply into Shirone's eyes as if discerning the truth.
It didn't seem to be a lie.
But children at that age often deceive adults with innocent faces as easily as eating.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: Alright, what kind of magic would you like to see?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Anything is fine. Just show me something, please. I beg you.
Shirone, realizing his position, bowed his head respectfully.
Alpheus, with a hearty laugh, waved his hand.
It wasn't particularly difficult to perform magic at a level suitable for playing with children.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: This old man's only joy is showing magic to our cute little ones. Good! Then this time I'll show you a magic that creates wind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wooah! Wind, wind!
While the children were clapping, Shirone, gripped by tension, clenched his fists.
It was natural since he knew nothing about magic.
Uwaaaaah!
The moment Alpheus waved his hand, Shirone's eyes widened at an unexpected floating sensation.
The world sank below, and his vision cleared.
He could see all the buildings of the magic school at once.
Shortly after, Shirone plummeted at an incredible speed.
He closed his eyes tightly and curled up at the sight of the ground rushing towards him.
But the desperate impact didn't come.
Gently opening his eyes, he found himself floating near the ground.
The children pointed at Shirone and laughed.
Alpheus was also watching with a wrinkled smile.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: How is it? This is magic.
All Shirone could hear was the sound of his heart beating in his chest.
Magic, experienced for the first time, surpassed the vague dreams of the boy.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What is magic?

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: Hmm, let's see. Magic is...
As Alpheus pondered with a mischievous look, an impatient Shirone added:

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's okay if I don't understand. Please tell me exactly as you think.
The children's faces hardened.
Alpheus was a famous magician known even in the kingdom.
That's why even noble children behave like gentle lambs.
So for the children, it was astonishing that Shirone would speak so impertinently.
Alpheus found it bold, but seeing desperation in it, he wasn't displeased.
The beautiful appearance, unlike a commoner, also helped dispel discomfort.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: Haha! No need to be so tense.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: In fact, it's not even a difficult story.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: But if you want, I'll raise the difficulty a bit.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: Magic is an act of breaking common sense.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: Conversely, it's a mental process that explores the truth of phenomena.
Shirone blinked and was lost in thought for a while.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If you don't know, you can say you don't know.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's different from common sense, but is it the truth in reality?
Alpheus pushed out his lower lip.
It was a habit that only emerged when he was truly surprised.
Understanding the true meaning from a short sentence is only possible when one completely comprehends something.
And that was precisely the insight that Alpheus had emphasized.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: Where did you learn such a thing?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Uh, well, from books.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: Are there books with such content?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Not the content, I just thought of it while reading books.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The idea that common sense isn't necessarily right.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I also thought that to reach the truth, one must ultimately fight against common sense.
Alpheus nodded.
It was a reasonable statement.
No, not reasonable, but the truth.
Does he really know what he's saying?
Anyone can recite what they've heard from someone else.
But if that's not the case...
Was he even 12 years old yet?
When a thought ascends to the rank of common sense, it becomes extremely difficult to destroy it.
The fact that he was already aware of the first objective of magic, which is essence, indicated considerable talent.
